note: NVIDIA’s fiscal quarters were aligned with calendar quarters, with data points assigned to the first day of each quarter. "Other" includes revenue from professional visualization, automotive tech, and chips sold to other manufacturers.
title: NVIDIA's quarterly revenue by market segment
subtitle: Quarterly revenue of NVIDIA Corporation across its main market segments, reported in US dollars. NVIDIA manufactures graphics processing units (GPUs), which were originally used for gaming and are now used to train AI models. This data is not adjusted for inflation.
